name: Silver Life Co., Ltd.
summary: Silver Life Co., Ltd., a franchise management company, provides food delivery services in Japan. It offers prepared food products and food ingredients primarily for the elderly and senior-care facilities. The company also engages in the original equipment manufacturing wholesale of frozen bento meals for other food preparation companies. In addition, it sells frozen bento meals through its website. As of July 31, 2020, the company operated 834 franchise stores. Silver Life Co., Ltd. was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
